title: Hybrid Video Conferencing General Information
body: Supported Video Collaboration Tools Tool For More Information Cisco Webex Webex Knowledge base Microsoft Teams Microsoft Teams Knowledge base Zoom Zoom Knowledge base Google Hangouts as part of Google Apps for UW Google Meet Knowledge base Supported Hardware Room Series Cisco Room Bar Cisco Room Bar Pro Cisco Room Kit Pro Cisco Room Kit EQ Cisco Room Kit EQX Cisco Room Kit - End of Life (Support available until January, 2030) Cisco Room Kit Mini - End of Life (Support available until October, 2029) Cisco Room Kit Plus - End of Life (Support available until April, 2030) Board Series Cisco Board Pro (55/75) - End of Life (Support available until November, 2029) Cisco Board Pro G2 Cisco Room Panorama Desk Series Cisco Desk Cisco Webex Board Pro Cisco Desk Pro Hardware Instructions Check out our Help Guide Consultation Request Check out our Custom Audiovisual Conference Room service page. Upcoming Features Check out the RoomOS Monthly Release Notes Room Designer Tool Looking to design a new room? Use this Workspace Designer Tool for recommendations on equipment needs How to Join a Meeting Zoom If the room was added to the Zoom event using the Room Resource Calendar (example - doit-2147-cs@doit.wisc.edu ), the meeting will appear on the touch panel 5 minutes before the scheduled start time. Tap Join to join the meeting. Note: If the Zoom meeting has not yet been started by the host, you will need to enter your Zoom host key or wait for the meeting to start. Manually Join - 1st Option If the room was not added to the Zoom event, tap Zoom Enter the Zoom meeting ID and Passcode when prompted If you are the host, enter your host key Manually Join - 2nd Option (Use when joining externally hosted Zoom Meetings) Invite the room in Zoom In Zoom, click Participants in the meeting controls Click Invite at the bottom of the participants panel Click the Room System tab Enter the "Pairing" code displayed on the TV/Projector Join a meeting from an H.323/SIP room system - Zoom Microsoft Teams If the room was added to the Microsoft Teams event using the Room Resource Calendar (example - doit-2147-cs@doit.wisc.edu ), the meeting will appear on the touch panel 5 minutes before the scheduled start time. Tap Join to join the meeting. Manually Join - 1st Option If the room was not added to the Teams meeting, tap Microsoft Teams Get the Video ID (NOT the Meeting ID or password) from the meeting invitation (example: 123 456 789 0) Enter the Video ID , then press Join Manually Join - 2nd Option (We highly recommend using 1st Option) If the room was not added to the Teams meeting, tap Microsoft Teams Get the Meeting ID and Passcode from the meeting invitation Enter the Meeting ID and Passcode , then press Join Cisco Webex If the room was added to the Webex event using the Room Resource Calendar (example - doit-2147-cs@doit.wisc.edu ), the meeting will appear on the touch panel 5 minutes before the scheduled start time. Tap Join to join the meeting. Manually Join To join a Webex meeting manually, tap Webex on the home screen: Enter the Meeting Number (access code) and tap Join Google Meet If the room was added to the Google Meet event using the Room Resource Calendar (example - doit-2147-cs@doit.wisc.edu ), the meeting will appear on the touch panel 5 minutes before the scheduled start time. Tap Join to join the meeting. Manually Join To join a Google Meet meeting manually, choose Google Meet on the home screen: Enter the 10-digit Meeting Code and tap Join Note: the meeting code can be found in the meeting invitation (example: abc-defg-xyz) Hybrid Conferencing Rooms 21 North Park 1st Floor -
